source_pr.title: parser: fix the compatibility problem of `UNION` statement

symptoms: tk.MustQuery("select 10 as a from dual union select a from t order by a desc limit 1 ").Check(testkit.Rows("10")) (executor/executor_test.go)
failure_signature: tk.MustQuery("select 10 as a from dual union select a from t order by a desc limit 1 ").Check(testkit.Rows("10")) (executor/executor_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: tk.MustQuery("select 10 as a from dual union select a from t order by a desc limit 1 ").Check(testkit.Rows("10")) (executor/executor_test.go)
